title: Exercises: Code Distance and Error Thresholds

exercises.title: Distance Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate code distance and correction capability.
exercises.expectedOutput: Distance and capability calculator with table
hints: Distance d equals lattice dimension for square codes

exercises.title: Logical Error Rate Simulator
exercises.description: Model logical error rate as function of physical rate and distance.
tasks: Plot p_L vs d for various physical rates
Find crossover point where higher d helps
Calculate required d for target p_L
exercises.expectedOutput: Logical error rate model with plots
hints: Invert formula to find required d

exercises.title: Resource Estimator
exercises.description: Estimate resources for fault-tolerant quantum computation.
tasks: Input: number of logical qubits, operations, target error
Calculate required distance per logical qubit
Compare resources for different physical error rates

exercises.title: Threshold Analyzer
exercises.description: Simulate surface code to estimate threshold.
tasks: Implement simple error model (random Pauli errors)
Count logical failures for various (p, d) pairs
Find crossing point of p_L curves
hints: Generate random errors with probability p
Threshold: where curves for different d cross
